Terms of Service

Effective date: April 4, 2026

Souschef is a meal planning and grocery management app made by Aletheia LLC. These terms cover your use of the app at getsouschef.app.

What Souschef Does

Souschef helps you plan meals, build grocery lists, order groceries online through Kroger, scan receipts, and track prices. It's a tool for your household — you control what goes on your meal plan and grocery list.

Your Account

You sign in with your email address (via magic link) or Google Sign-In. You're responsible for access to your email account, since that's how authentication works. One account per person.

You can invite household members to share your meal plans and grocery lists. When you invite someone, they see and can edit the same data you do. You're responsible for who you invite.

Kroger Integration

If you connect your Kroger account, Souschef can search products, add items to your Kroger cart, and submit orders on your behalf. You're placing real orders with real money through your own Kroger account. Souschef is not responsible for Kroger's pricing, availability, substitutions, or fulfillment. Your relationship with Kroger is governed by Kroger's own terms.

You can disconnect your Kroger account at any time from the Account page.

Pricing

Souschef is currently free during early access. We plan to move to a subscription model with a free trial. We'll give you notice before any charges begin. If you don't want to pay, you can stop using the app — we won't charge you without your consent.

Your Content

Your recipes, meal plans, grocery lists, ratings, and notes belong to you. We don't claim ownership of your content. We do need the right to store and process it to make the app work.

Acceptable Use

Don't abuse the app. This means:

  • Don't try to access other people's accounts or data
  • Don't hammer the API with automated requests
  • Don't use the app for anything illegal

We have rate limits in place and will restrict accounts that abuse the service.

Availability

We try to keep Souschef running reliably, but we can't guarantee 100% uptime. The app may be temporarily unavailable for maintenance or due to issues beyond our control.

Account Deletion

You can sign out at any time. To delete your account and all associated data, email us at support@aletheia-apps.com. We'll process deletions within 30 days.

Limitation of Liability

Souschef is provided as-is. We're not liable for grocery orders gone wrong, incorrect prices, receipt parsing errors, or meals that don't turn out. Use your own judgment when placing orders and cooking for your family.

To the extent permitted by law, Aletheia LLC's total liability is limited to the amount you've paid us in the past 12 months.

Changes to These Terms

We may update these terms. If we make significant changes, we'll notify you in the app. Continued use after changes means you accept the new terms.

Contact

Questions? Email us at support@aletheia-apps.com.

Aletheia LLC — Tucker, Georgia
